IMPLANTOLOGY.NAME: Implantology
IMPLANTOLOGY.TITLE: Implantology
IMPLANTOLOGY.DESCRIPTION: Dental implants replace missing teeth with stable, natural-looking solutions. We work with proven systems and plan treatment individually for predictable results.

AESTHETICS_SPA.NAME: Aesthetics & Spa
AESTHETICS_SPA.TITLE: Aesthetics & Spa
AESTHETICS_SPA.DESCRIPTION: Aesthetic treatments focused on harmony, comfort and natural results.

TOOTH_EXTRACTION.NAME: Tooth Extraction
TOOTH_EXTRACTION.TITLE: Tooth Extraction
TOOTH_EXTRACTION.DESCRIPTION: Safe extractions, including surgical cases. Minimal trauma, good healing protocols.

PRICES_PAGE.TITLE: PRICES
PRICES_PAGE.CAUTION: The cost of treatment is determined individually during a consultation with the doctor
PRICES_PAGE.COMMON_DESCRIPTION: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit...

ITEMS.ITEM_03: Professional dental cleaning - scaling, air polishing, fluoride treatment
ITEMS.ITEM_12: Removal of a restoration from a prosthetic abutment
ITEMS.ITEM_19: Removal of a post or broken instrument
ITEMS.ITEM_24: Preparation of a surgical plan and guided implant surgery template
ITEMS.ITEM_28: All-ceramic crown on an MIS implant
